nasb.text: “Honor your father and your mother, that your days may be prolonged in the land which the Lord your God gives you.

esv.text: “Honor your father and your mother, that your days may be long in the land that the Lord your God is giving you.

cnv.text: “要孝敬父母，使你在耶和華你的　神賜給你的地上得享長壽。

ccb.text: “要孝敬父母，以便在你的上帝耶和华赐给你的土地上享长寿。
